# MEOK Post-Signup — Free Tier Welcome

> What you got + first 5 minutes + next 24 hours

## Your API key
sent via email. Use as `x-api-key` header on every keystone call.

## First 5 minutes
1. Sign a free-tier attestation
2. Verify the cert
3. Open the human-readable verify page
4. Install the offline verify tool
5. Browse the 32 MCP servers

## Next 24 hours
7-day lead-magnet email sequence. Day 0: the Article 50 scope brief. Day 1-7: each day's deep dive.

## Pro
£199/mo · 1,000 calls/day · signed Ed25519 · priority support
